title: Drop Missing Data
description:
There are some rows having missing values in the name column.
Write a solution to remove the rows with missing values.
The result format is in the following example.
Example 1:

examples.example_text:
DataFrame students
+-------------+--------+
| Column Name | Type   |
+-------------+--------+
| student_id  | int    |
| name        | object |
| age         | int    |
+-------------+--------+

hints: Consider using a build-in function in pandas library to remove the rows with missing values based on specified data.
